# Tutorials

The tutorials below explain how to set up, run, and extend OPEN-PROM.

```{toctree}
06_regionalization_in_open_prom
07_gams_error_codes

09_creating_fixme_issues_from_code_comments

11_updating_dataset_of_github_actions

13_soft_linking_tutorial_open_prom_climate_emulators

```
